sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46951" key="h(lwto/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡλωτός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἡλόω</etym>) <sense id="n46951.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">nailed, nail-shaped</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:66" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.66</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
